trait_label: individual flower or capitulum size
mechanism_claim: changes detectability and handling and may change florivore exposure
notes: analyse as direct measurement rather than a universal attraction score

trait_label: flower number or display area
mechanism_claim: changes floral display to mutualists and antagonists
notes: retain flower number and display area separately when possible

trait_label: corolla depth width or floral opening
mechanism_claim: changes visitor access and handling
notes: require a source-specific definition and units

trait_label: nectar volume sugar amount or concentration
mechanism_claim: changes reward quantity or quality
notes: do not mix volume and concentration without a declared transformation

trait_label: reflectance or contrast measurement
mechanism_claim: changes visual detection and preference
notes: exclude categorical pollination syndrome and uncalibrated colour labels

trait_label: volatile emission or compound profile
mechanism_claim: can attract or repel mutualists and antagonists
notes: requires comparable collection and chemistry protocols

trait_label: spine density or length on bracts or involucre
mechanism_claim: limits consumer access and may impede visitors
notes: high relevance for Cirsium but not presumed globally available

trait_label: trichome density or type on floral structures
mechanism_claim: physical barrier or deterrence with possible visitor effects
notes: organ-specific measurement required

trait_label: sticky secretion around reproductive structures
mechanism_claim: entrapment or access limitation
notes: mechanism and non-target effects must be directly measured

trait_label: specific leaf area
mechanism_claim: leaf construction and resource-quality proxy not direct resistance
notes: analyse together with LDMC and leaf nutrients not as defence score

trait_label: leaf dry matter content
mechanism_claim: leaf tissue density and construction-quality proxy
notes: not interchangeable with SLA despite correlation in some taxa

trait_label: leaf nitrogen concentration per dry mass
mechanism_claim: resource quality and nutritional value proxy
notes: require dry-mass basis and organ-stage metadata

trait_label: leaf phosphorus concentration per dry mass
mechanism_claim: resource quality proxy
notes: include only if coverage supports a separate nutrient axis

trait_label: leaf thickness
mechanism_claim: physical construction and potential palatability proxy
notes: not a direct toughness measurement

trait_label: force to punch cut or fracture leaf tissue
mechanism_claim: direct mechanical barrier to feeding
notes: retain only if units and protocol are harmonisable

trait_label: trichome density or type on leaves
mechanism_claim: physical deterrence or handling barrier
notes: do not mix glandular and non-glandular trichomes without a mechanism rule

trait_label: spine or prickle density on leaves
mechanism_claim: access limitation with consumer-size-dependent effect
notes: do not interpret as an insect-defence proxy without evidence for the relevant guild

trait_label: latex resin or sticky exudate
mechanism_claim: deterrence trapping or reduced digestibility
notes: requires chemically and structurally comparable definitions

trait_label: measured defensive compound concentration
mechanism_claim: deterrence toxicity or digestibility reduction
notes: never pool unlike compound classes into one global chemical-defence score

trait_label: leaf area lobing dissection or shape index
mechanism_claim: may alter exposure microclimate or handling but no universal defence direction
notes: needs an explicit herbivore mechanism before reclassification

trait_label: leaf mottling or variegation
mechanism_claim: may alter detection mimic damage or reflect physiology but direction unresolved
notes: not a defence trait by default

trait_label: wood density bark thickness or stem chemistry
mechanism_claim: organ-specific resistance to stem consumers
notes: do not combine with leaf or floral traits

trait_label: leaf cutting transport or nest-material performance
mechanism_claim: material suitability is distinct from damage resistance
notes: not herbivory by default
